next_steps: Obtain emergent 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG) to identify rhythm
Perform urgent ICD interrogation to evaluate for stored rhythm episodes
Check serum digoxin level and electrolytes (potassium, magnesium)
Immediate telemetry monitoring and stabilization of hemodynamics
Point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to assess for tamponade, prosthetic valve dysfunction, or wall motion abnormalities
Stat laboratory evaluation including cardiac troponins, NT-proBNP, and thyroid function tests
Avoid immediate AV-nodal blocking agents until rhythm is confirmed as supraventricular
